title: OpenAI ships GPT-4.1 with 1M context window
content: OpenAI released GPT-4.1 featuring a 1 million token context window and improved instruction following across text and vision tasks.

title: Google Gemini 2.5 Pro adds native audio output
content: Google's Gemini 2.5 Pro now supports native audio generation and reasoning with multi-turn voice conversations.

title: vLLM v0.6.0 ships chunked prefill for 2x throughput
content: vLLM releases v0.6.0 with chunked prefill enabling up to 2x throughput improvement on long-context workloads.

title: EU AI Act enforcement begins for GPAI providers
content: The European Union's AI Act entered into enforcement for general-purpose AI providers requiring systemic risk assessments and transparency reports.
